title: schoenus clandestinus
intro: Schoenus clandestinus, also known as the hidden club rush, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Schoenus clandestinus include wound healing, reduced inflammation, and potential protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Schoenus clandestinus can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
